seo.title: Guided tours — Vukan's Bike Shop
seo.description: We organise guided tours for small groups by appointment. Routes are matched to the group's level, pace, and goals.

props.headline: Guided tours
props.subheadline: Tours are arranged by appointment. Pace, length, and difficulty are tailored to the group.

props.heading: What to expect
props.subheading: Each tour is tailored to the group — with a clear plan and a safe, comfortable pace.

items.title: Route to match you
items.description: Before the ride we agree terrain, distance, and climbing with your goals and fitness in mind.

items.title: Guided on the trail
items.description: We manage pace and line choice so the ride flows, stays safe, and feels good for everyone.

items.title: Small groups
items.description: We work best in small groups so we can tune the experience to each rider.

items.title: Safety and clarity
items.description: Clear briefing before we roll; steady pacing and organisation on the ride.

props.heading: Guided tour gallery
props.subheading: We will add more photos from tours soon; for now here are highlights from the shop and events.

props.heading: How we run a tour
props.subheading: Simple and flexible — everything by agreement.

steps.title: Enquiry
steps.description: You share preferred dates, group size, and roughly what kind of ride you want.

steps.title: Plan the route
steps.description: Together we set level, length, and terrain — from easy paths to more technical trails.

steps.title: Ride day
steps.description: On the day we lead clearly, cover safety, and keep the group feeling good.

steps.title: Wrap-up
steps.description: Short feedback after the tour; we can suggest a next route if you like.

props.heading: Book your guided tour
props.subheading: Tours run by appointment, depending on availability.
